title: The Dromedary
content:
The Dromedary is a cheerful bird:
    I cannot say the same about the Kurd.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Hilaire Belloc, titled "The Dromedary", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
